Why we started EcoScape

Most landscapers don't listen. We had to fix that.

We're high schoolers who grew up in Lake Ronkonkoma, and we kept hearing the same complaint from neighbors: big landscaping companies show up late, don't return calls, and charge whatever they feel like — without ever really listening to what the property actually needs.

So we started EcoScape. We're young, but we take the work seriously: we show up when we say we will, we do the job right, and we actually talk to you about your lawn instead of just running a mower over it and leaving. Because we only work in Lake Ronkonkoma, we know the neighborhoods, the soil, and the properties better than a crew driving in from somewhere else — and we can keep our prices lower than anyone else because we're not paying for a franchise, a fleet, or a call center.

  • Reliable, not just cheap. We confirm every appointment and show up on time.
  • Knowledgeable. We know how to care for lawns properly, not just cut grass.
  • Local, exclusively. We only serve Lake Ronkonkoma, so scheduling stays tight and prices stay low.
  • Convenient. Free quotes, easy scheduling, and consistent weekday service all year.

Full-service lawn & garden care

Anything your lawn or garden needs

If it grows on your property, we can take care of it. Here's everything EcoScape covers in Lake Ronkonkoma:

Lawn Mowing

Regular mowing on a schedule that fits your property, all year round, weekdays only.

Property Cleanups

Seasonal cleanups — leaves, debris, and everything else your yard collects.

Gardening

Planting, bed maintenance, and general garden upkeep to keep things looking sharp.

Trimming & Edging

Hedges, bushes, edges — any trimming or shaping your lawn and landscaping need.

Mulching

Fresh mulch to protect your beds, lock in moisture, and finish the look of your yard.

Weeding

Weeds pulled and beds cleared, so your lawn and gardens stay healthy, not overgrown.

The EcoScape difference

Cheaper, easier, and only here.
